speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Now for some absolutely brilliant science news that'll blow your socks off! <cite index="18-3,18-4">Two UNSW researchers have been awarded Snow Medical Research Foundation fellowships worth $8 million each over eight years - that's serious recognition for tackling complex health challenges</cite>!

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] Eight million each, Alex! That's the kind of investment that'll change lives. And over at Loughborough University, <cite index="13-1">an international team including their researchers has developed a method to dramatically speed up the discovery and design of advanced materials</cite>.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] It's like watching the future unfold before our eyes! The pace of scientific discovery these days is just phenomenal - from medical breakthroughs to materials science, our brightest minds are absolutely smashing it.
